mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rate increases discount rates for equity valuations, leading to negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate crossing above 4.0% signals labor market deterioration and recession risk, triggering negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales combined with rising interest rates indicates demand destruction, leading to negative forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient is insignificant (p > 0.1) in OLS regression over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production rebounds from a supply shock trough, signaling short-term inventory restocking and positive equity returns over 5 days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of triggered instances across multiple backtest periods.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently high inflation erodes real corporate margins and forces central bank tightening, producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or inflation spikes fail to predict negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: Nonfarm payrolls growth exceeding 200k per month sustains consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >60% of triggered instances over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Falling housing starts alongside rising mortgage rates signal a housing market downturn, dragging on financial sector earnings and equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction effect is statistically insignificant or direction flips to positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth deceleration below 1.0% quarter-over-quarter indicates late-cycle economic slowdown, leading to negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >50% of triggered instances over 60 days during late-cycle phases.
